subject: fix(build): remove unused imports causing vue-tsc errors
body:
Remove unused `selectSuggestion` destructure from ExpenseForm and
unused `primaryTag` import from exportImport.ts. These caused the
Vercel build to fail with TS6133 errors.

Tags: build, fix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: bank-statement-import
Semver: patch
